data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of click/session attribution records, which is a critical need outlined in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or data regarding click/session attribution records, indicating a clear gap in the requirement. The absence of this specific evidence leads to the conclusion that the requirement is not met.
gaps: No evidence of click/session attribution records.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
